How it works

STEP 01
Choose a Vehicle
Browse our fleet and pick the car that best suits your needs and budget.
STEP 02
Pick Date & Location
Select your preferred pick-up and drop-off dates and one of our locations.
STEP 03
Send a Request
Submit your booking request – we confirm within a few hours via WhatsApp or email.
STEP 04
Pick Up Your Keys
Collect the car at the agreed location and enjoy your drive.
What we offer

Everything you need
for a perfect drive

Airport Transfer
Direct pick-up at Pristina or Skopje Airport – punctual and reliable.
24/7 Support
Available around the clock by phone, WhatsApp or Instagram.
Full Insurance
All vehicles are fully insured – drive with complete peace of mind.
Flexible Drop-off
Return the vehicle at any of our locations or directly at the airport.
Where to find us

Our Locations

Ferizaj – Headquarters
Rr. Emin Duraku, Ferizaj 70000, Kosovo
Main Location Mon–Sun Parking
Pristina Airport
Prishtina International Airport Adem Jashari, Kosovo
Airport Service 24/7 Pick-up & Drop-off
Skopje Airport
Skopje International Airport, North Macedonia
Airport Service Pick-up & Drop-off
Kukes Airport (Albania)
Kukes International Airport, Albania
Airport Service Pick-up & Drop-off
